data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures all user data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit, AES-256 encryption for data at rest.

data.title: Security Monitoring and Incident Response
data.description: Continuous monitoring for security threats with a robust incident response team.
data.technical_spec: SIEM systems and a dedicated security operations center.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Optional 2FA for user accounts to enhance account security.
data.technical_spec: Supports TOTP apps for second-factor authentication.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits and vulnerability assessments.
data.technical_spec: Third-party audits, penetration testing, and code reviews.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protects against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Cloudflare protection and in-house mitigation strategies.
